narrative:
Precinct Vernon Township A (precinct in Scioto County) has 429 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points.
